bullets.text: Iran and Pakistan state that a deal to end fighting with the US is closer than ever, echoing a statement made by US President Donald Trump.

An investigation has found that global brands like Amazon and Sony may be using coltan, a mineral sourced from supply chains controlled by M23 rebels accused of atrocities in the Democratic Republic of Congo.
A man was shot dead in Kenya during protests against a proposed US Ebola quarantine facility, as police dispersed demonstrators amid rising anger.
Australia's new ambassador to Washington, Greg Moriarty, has stated he will "robustly" challenge the Trump administration's new tariff plan, which he described as "extremely disappointing."
A highly secretive and unusual court case is unfolding in Far North Queensland, involving a prominent married man, an alleged affair, and a non-publication order.
One Nation has successfully raised almost $3 million this week, prompting discussion about the party's fundraising efforts and how major parties are responding.
Elon Musk's SpaceX achieved a historic debut on Wall Street, becoming one of the world's most valuable companies after its initial public offering, which also saw its shares close 19% higher.
Oil prices have fallen to a three-month low due to progress toward a US-Iran peace deal and signs of increased flows through the Strait of Hormuz, easing concerns about energy supply.
Private-equity executive Matt Holt's firm, Thoreau Group, is reportedly in advanced talks to acquire Ensemble Health Partners in a deal valued at approximately $12 billion.
